title: SakuraHeads
description: Plugin for head drop after killing players
body:
![SakuraPluginIco](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/832b74700a5c20f0ee5675dbc41269545dd918c6.png) [![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/sakuraheads?color=00AF5C&label=Downloads&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/sakuraheads "Modrinth Downloads")

![ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20f793a81f622934df815a221e7b5b354628b4e6_0.webp)

English

With this plugin you can add a drop of heads to your server after the death of players!

EN Config ``` # By xoxmuk # v1.2.0 # Download: PlaceholderAPI and LuckPerms # For PlaceholderAPI: /papi ecloud download LuckPerms # Colors: § and & # Plugin Placeholders: %name%, %killer%, %owner%, %receiver% Settings: # Chance of dropping a head (0.0 - 100.0) drop-chance: 100.0 Messages: tag: "&f[&#E43A96S&#E5489Da&#E756A4k&#E864ACu&#EA72B3r&#EB80BAa&#EC8EC1H&#EE9CC8e&#EFAAD0a&#F1B8D7d&#F2C6DEs&f] " no-permission: "§c§l× §cYou don't have enough permissions!" cmd-reload-message: "§a§l✅ §aThe plugin has been reloaded!" cmd-give-message: "§a§l✅ &aHead &f%owner% &agiven to player &f%receiver%&a!" death-message: "§c§l💀 §r%name% §cYou died and lost your head." ```
![splitter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42c0138331a26035c811980f010c088f35dfc09b.png)

Русский

С Помощью данного плагина вы сможете добавить на свой сервер дроп голов после смерти игроков!

RU Config conig.yml ``` # By xoxmuk # v1.2.0 # Download: PlaceholderAPI and LuckPerms # For PlaceholderAPI: /papi ecloud download LuckPerms # Colors: § and & # Plugin Placeholders: %name%, %killer%, %owner%, %receiver% Settings: # Шанс выпадения головы (0.0 - 100.0) drop-chance: 100.0 Messages: tag: "&f[&#E43A96S&#E5489Da&#E756A4k&#E864ACu&#EA72B3r&#EB80BAa&#EC8EC1H&#EE9CC8e&#EFAAD0a&#F1B8D7d&#F2C6DEs&f] " no-permission: "§c§l× §cУ вас не достаточно прав!" cmd-reload-message: "§a§l✅ §aПлагин был перезагружен!" cmd-give-message: "§a§l✅ &aГолова &f%owner% &aвыдана игроку &f%receiver%&a!" death-message: "§c§l💀 §r%name% §cВы умерли и потеряли голову." ```
![splitter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42c0138331a26035c811980f010c088f35dfc09b.png)

Український

З Допомога даного плагіна ви зможете додати на свій сервер дроп голів після смерті гравців!

UA Config conig.yml ``` # By xoxmuk # v1.2.0 # Завантажити: PlaceholderAPI та LuckPerms # Для PlaceholderAPI: /papi ecloud download LuckPerms # Кольори: § та & # Заповнювачі плагіна: %name%, %killer%, %owner%, %receiver% Settings: # Шанс випадання голови (0.0 - 100.0) drop-chance: 100.0 Messages: tag: "&f[&#E43A96S&#E5489Da&#E756A4k&# E864ACu&#EA72B3r&#EB80BAa&#EC8EC1H&#EE9CC8e&#EFAAD0a&#F1B8D7d&#F2C6DEs&f] " no-permission: «§c§l× §cУ вас недостатньо прав!» cmd-reload-message: "§ a§l✅ §aПлагін було перезавантажено!" cmd-give-message: «§a§l✅ &aГолова &f%owner% &avдана гравцеві &f%receiver%&a!» death-message: «§c§l💀 §r%name% §cВи померли і втратили голову.» ```
